description: Implement Lighting Design (belysning), Heat Pump Installation (varmepumpe), and Busbar Trunking System (skinnesystem) modules with full calculation engines, click-only trilingual UI, DS/HD 60364 compliance, and 45+ comprehensive tests.
steps: 1. Add module translations for 'lighting', 'heatpump', 'busbar' to T.da.modules, T.en.modules, T.fa.modules
2. Add Farsi translations to _FA dictionary for all new module strings
3. Add case statements for 'lighting', 'heatpump', 'busbar' in renderModule switch
4. Implement Lighting Design module with lux calculation, luminaire count, uniformity check, circuit design per DS/EN 12464-1
5. Implement Heat Pump Installation module with COP-based power, cable sizing, MCB/RCD selection per DS/HD 60364
6. Implement Busbar Trunking module with derating, tap-off diversity, short-circuit withstand per IEC 61439-6
7. Add 45+ tests to test-sld.js covering all three modules
acceptance_criteria: All existing 267 tests continue to pass
45+ new tests pass for lighting, heatpump, and busbar modules
All render functions return HTML with no <input type='text'> or <textarea>
All calculations cite DS/EN 12464-1, DS/HD 60364, or IEC 61439-6 clauses
Lighting module calculates correct luminaire count and uniformity
Heat pump module selects correct MCB curve C and RCD type A
Busbar module applies derating and diversity factors correctly
Conservative calculations throughout (ceiling for danger, floor for capacity)
verification: node /projects/sandbox/Claude/test-sld.js 2>&1 | grep 'Results:' should show 317 passed, 0 failed
findings: All 317 tests pass (267 existing + 50 new). Lighting module uses DS/EN 12464-1 Table 5.x lux requirements and room index for UF lookup. Heat pump module uses COP-based electrical input, curve C MCBs (3P available only, function falls back gracefully), 30mA Type A RCD mandatory. Busbar module uses IEC 61439-6 derating factors (temp, IP, installation) with floor rounding for conservative capacity. All render functions click-only with sel-btn buttons.
